caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, black headphones, and a dark green t-shirt with the text "I CAN NEVER DO SHIT" printed on the front is speaking into a black professional microphone. He is positioned in a room that appears to be a studio or clothing store, with several framed photographs on the wall behind him and a white mannequin wearing a white t-shirt to his right. In the background, racks of clothing and a black office chair are visible. To the left and right of the lower portion of the scene, there are logos that read "THE" and "REALLY REALLY HOT". As the sequence progresses, the man gestures with his right hand, raising it and pointing his index finger upward while continuing to speak. He maintains a focused expression, shifting his gaze slightly as he speaks into the microphone.
